place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands
content: We absolutely loved our rental in Folly right on the beach! Every morning we woke to a gorgeous sunrise and walked the beach.  We enjoyed the short walk into town and the short drive into Charleston for dinner and shopping. The beach was perfect for playing beach games and walking. I even found an actual shark tooth! The house was clean and bright and Carolina one was very responsive when we reached out.

place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands
content:
Cute endless charm! Everything we needed and cared for with any problems!. Communication was great! Responding quickly on any questions. The views were fantastic, will never forget this jewel! Hope to come back soon!
Thanks again for everything!

place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands
content: Fantastic rental, in a prime location on Folly beach. Waking up to the ocean views each morning was exactly what our family needed. Carolina One was easy to work with, and the home was exactly as described(possibly even better). I look forward to further vacations with Carolina One.

place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands
content: This property was perfect for our family. The views and location were perfect. We will definitely book this again

place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands
content: We were pleasantly impressed by the quality of the  condo.  The furnishings were very nice-even had a Fender acoustical guitar.  Very clean and well-stocked.  We did not need any additional items.  The rental management personnel were very helpful and tolerated my operator error in locking the door.  The unit was very comfortable and relaxing.  We would definitely stay in this unit again.

place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands
content: The property Folly Me was perfect for our family of mixed ages. As they say - location, location, location.  The playground next door was perfect for our younger children, our teenager loved the pool, and we kept momma happy by having the beach just a short walk away. Ultimate flexibility for a busy family. It was also easy to get our daily exercise walking to Center Street for food and shopping.  It was exceedingly peaceful around the house and easy to relax.  The house shows a bit of age, but it has been lovingly cared for by its owners and is in excellent shape.  Looking forward to our next stay!

place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands
content: We stayed at Queen of Folly and had a wonderful experience with our two adult children and their spouses. The house was very clean. Pluses was garage parking, washer and dryer, 3 bedrooms with 3 baths, beautiful kitchen and comfortable living space, screened in porch, and easily walkable to the beach as well as town. We will definitely be back!

place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands
content: Beautiful and very comfortable house. The kitchen was very well stocked with dishes, entertainment items and small appliances. The bedrooms are spacious. The views are amazing! We appreciated the various items for guests, such as games, magazines, and books. The rental process was easy and the communication was great. We would definitely rent again.

place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands
content: Using Carolina One for our vacation rental, was the best experience we have had by far. The team is top notch and very helpful. A huge thank you to Darcie, who went and purchased a blow dryer for us and brought it to our rental! The house was spotless when we arrived and  everything was beautifully arranged.A shout out to the cleaning staff! Since it was our Anniversary, they had a lovely bouquet and chilled champagne for us  ...plus a card from the great staff...we were touched. Thank you for a memorable time. We can’t wait to use your team for our next getaway !

place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands
content: My girlfriends and I stayed at La Bella Vita for a girl's weekend. We loved the house! It is spacious and comfortable. There were enough bathrooms for all of us to get ready in. The wrap around porch is incredible, and we were very close to the beach. We wish we had more time at the house and on the island!

place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands
content: Three Little Mermaids home on Folly Beach was literally right on the beach so you just need to walk out your door to experience amazing sights and sounds! The home was clean and inviting and we felt right at home immediately. It was great fun to watch the tide coming in and out each day.

place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands
content: We loved our Folly Beach vacation.  The condo was very clean and had the amenities needed to feel like home.  Carolina One was very easy to communicate with leading up to our stay.  Thank you for a great family trip filled with many memories to last a lifetime!

place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands
content: Our family of 6 (4 adults, 2 kids) had a great time during our stay at Folly Me, managed by Carolina One. The house was very conveniently located to the beach, had ample parking, was spacious, and the pool was priceless. The decor was very updated, as well as kitchen appliances. Kitchen was stocked with everything we needed to cook and enjoy dinner at home! There was even a cabinet full of games to play as a family. The queen bedroom was large enough to accommodate a pack and play for our infant to sleep in. All of the TVs were “smart” and preloaded with apps such as Netflix, prime video, etc (had to use our own logins). I think they also had cable hooked up in the living room. We were equipped with plenty of bath and beach/pool towels which was really appreciated. Laundry room conveniently located in the hallway was perfect for ensuring we had fresh towels every day. The house came with a small amount of essentials to get started such as dish soap, dishwasher detergent packs, and shampoo/conditioner. Make sure to bring laundry detergent from home as well as coffee. Keurig machine as well as traditional coffee pot worked great for our group.  All in all, loved our time here and would absolutely come back and stay again!

place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands
content: This was our first time staying here and we had a great time!  They give you suggestions on places to eat.  The house was clean and they even have trial toiletries.  We loved the screened in porch.  Great to be right on the ocean. We have stayed at plenty of houses and they one thing that stood out for me was how everything was labeled.  All the light switches & the drawers in the kitchen.  We would definitely book again.

place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands
content: A beautiful February week at the beach! Such a comfortable and well appointed home. We loved the Folly Beach vibe and the close proximity to Charleston for shopping and dining. We will be back! The staff at Carolina One are the best. Very polite and responsive to any needs.

place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands
content: We enjoyed our stay but: 3 took a shower and no hot water. Only 5 coffee mugs .  Kitchen not stocked well. Never stayed anywhere with not one lamp in the place. Water on door of fridge quit working. So badly painted it is not a nice place. I have stayed in this complex before and loved it. I will not rent this unit ever again. Also rug on porch is torn up and coming in under the door . Need to dust tv screen. At least an inch of dust on tv screen. Unit has lots of cheapest in appearance with curtains in the master and horrible paint job in places. Just not as nice as other rentals in the lovely complex.

place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands
content: We had a great stay at this condo! It’s updated, well maintained, and comfortable. The beds were comfortable and the living space was well decorated and cozy. The location is in the center of town and you can’t beat the view!

place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands
content:
My family had a wonderful experience working with Carolina One Real Estate on our recent vacation to Folly Beach. The team was a pleasure to work with from our first encounter all the way through the rental process.

The home we rented was gorgeous and very thoughtfully and lovingly organized by the property owners and a joy for my family to rent on our vacation.

place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands
content: Namastay was the perfect place for a girls getaway retreat! We had the best time and couldn't have asked for a better home or area! Namastay was further down the beach which we appreciated as traffic was nonexistent. The screened in back porch was our favorite place to be! It seated all of us comfortably and we loved watching the sun set each night with dinner. The front room had a large couch and all of the seats reclined! The reclining "lever" was a round piece between the cushions- We also appreciated that the owner placed cards in each room with instructions on how to use the TVs, espresso machine (Wow! Putting this on my Christmas list now. I didn't know how much I would love a milk frother until I used this all week :)), tidbits about the beach etc. We appreciated the new washer and dryer and  the fact that beach towels (for 10 guests) were provided as well. Large showers were a bonus- I have only rented homes with tub showers before and the amount of room in the showers and tile decor was delightful. The lights also dimmed in each room and we were able to use this feature at night. The house has plenty of natural light during the day so we actually never had to touch a switch from sunrise until sunset. Thank you, Namastay, for making our beach vacation so wonderful. We will definitely be renting this home again due to the great location and updated features!

place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands
content: Beautiful large home in a beautiful place.  Well equipped and clean in a great location, within walking distance of downtown Folly Beach.  Carolina One Real Estate was very easy to work with and communicated well before and during our stay.

place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands
content: Rental was exactly as described and shown in the photos of Turn of River 1D. It was very clean and updated. Check in was a breeze. Would definitely recommend.

place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands

place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands
content:
This company treated myself and family terribly when we had to make a change to our vacation plans two weeks before our trip due to a true family emergency and crisis. They were callous, cold, and even accused us of lying several times and refused to refund us even just a partial amount of the $5000 we had already paid to secure the rental. We sent our friends to enjoy the house in our place since we couldn’t make it, and afterwards, our friends told us of many of the issues with the rental, so we left a review. They again accused us of lying to add insult to injury.
This company is garbage, and are pretty heartless humans from my humble experience. I would avoid working with them like the plague.

place_name: Carolina One Real Estate West Islands
content: An agent from this location was the selling agent for a property my family was interested in. The agent in question asked my agent for personal information like my age and my backstory. My agent refused to provide any information other than we have been pre-approved for our loan. Our original offer was passed up for another offer, which happens. Then he reached back out when that contract fell through. Our 2nd offer couldn't be accepted due to termination paperwork not being finalized in time. Then finally we get an email saying within hours of the property becoming available on the market again they had multiple offers and that we needed to put our "best and highest offer" by a particular time. We put in our offer again asking price with the seller paying the closing. No counter offer for asking price and no closing cost covered just straight denial within hours of submitting our offer and the supposed deadline wasn't even over yet. Due to personal questions being asked about my family and I feel that there may be foul play. If not its still unethical to ask about my personal information. I understand that agents have a duty to their clients but they also have a duty to other agents as well as buyers. As a member of a industry held to similar standards and one that works with the real estate industry I am so upset with our encounter with this agent.

If you are buying or selling a house, McCord Tarrant with Carolina One Real Estate is your man.

Will H and Louise H

However having a team such as Kory & Leslie made this process feel like a breeze. I cannot thank them both for their patience and professionalism as they worked with us on selling my first home. From creating the gorgeous photos to list my home to continuing to keep quick, open communication along the way, they truly embody the meaning of teamwork; as their teamwork made my dream work! Though a bit better sweet to be saying goodbye to my first home, glad to begin this next chapter in my life and could not have started this next chapter without the support from Charleston Property Group!

I would highly recommend using her whether you are looking to buy or sell.

content: I can’t say enough good things about the Keadle team.  We have bought and sold homes in several states on the east coast and consider the Keadle team to be in the league of their own. Not only are they the best real estate folks we have ever worked with, they are just great people. After 14 years of working on several challenging sales together in the Charleston area, we also consider them good friends. We know that we can call Lee anytime for home repair questions, references, and project advice. The Keadle team has a genuine interest in their business and it becomes readily apparent that they love what they do. Lee recently helped us thru a particularly difficult home sale.  Due to his patience, perseverance, people skills, knowledge of home construction, doggedness, and willingness to go the extra mile, the deal was sealed. The Keadle team has always been there for US! We would highly recommend Lee to anyone in the market to buy or sell a home and are looking forward to working again with the Keadle team to help us with our upcoming home purchase.

place_name: The Keadle Real Estate Group
content:

After the purchase we worked with Lee to sell our old house and it was an equally enjoyable and stress free experience.  Lee and his team staged the house beautifully and as a direct result of their skill and attention to detail we had multiple offers in less than a week.
Lee also assists in other areas  - from negotiations to inspection. He was equally attentive post purchase, checking in frequently to make sure we had settled in well, and even connecting us with contractors, handymen and a variety of services that helped us get our home in order quickly. I would highly recommend the Keadle Real Estate Group to anyone looking to buy or a sell in the low country.

content: The help that Lee and Mary Glenn gave us to find our new home was incredible.  They were always available and always quick to get back to us with new prospects and answer our questions. We highly recommend the Keadle Group and don’t believe we would be as happy as we are with our new home without them.

Her integrity is unwavering, and her advanced knowledge of real estate shines through in every interaction. What sets Carrie apart is not only her professional expertise but also her easygoing nature, making it incredibly easy to connect with her. If you're looking for a realtor who combines a laid-back attitude with a strong commitment to your goals, Carrie is the perfect choice.

place_name: Carolina One: Carrie Rosen
content: Carrie worked tirelessly to help us sell our Folly Beach condo. Our initial contract fell through due to buyer financing issues, and she had more potential buyers lined up in less than 24 hours! She bent over backwards to work in showings and open houses around our crazy rental schedule. Having worked with other agents throughout the years, even working as an agent myself for a bit, I can honestly say that Carrie is the friendliest and the most responsive agent I have ever known. She made a pretty crazy transaction so much less stressful, and I’m supper happy she was there to help us. She genuinely cares about her clients, and for us, it was like having a good friend helping us get our place sold - which is extra comforting because we live six hours away! I would absolutely work with Carrie again and recommend her to anyone.

place_name: Carolina One: Carrie Rosen
content: Awesome experience!  Carrie started showing us properties and helping us learn Folly Beach 4 years ago.  When we finally found the right property, she pulled everything together and helped us close within a week!  If you’re looking for a home on Folly Beach, or in Charleston, she’s the one!

place_name: Carolina One: Carrie Rosen
content: Working with Carrie on the sale of my home was such a positive experience.  She came prepared with information and through her networking, knowledge and professionalism, along with her warm and inviting personality, sold my home quickly.  Would highly recommend Carrie for any real estate transaction you may be considering.

place_name: Carolina One: Carrie Rosen
content: Carrie is extremely patient, understanding and knowledgeable about the industry. She guided me through selling a property that has been in my family for several generations, which was an emotional process for me, but was necessary given our financial situation. She is a great listener, which helps her in successfully catering to the needs and desires of her clients. Also, her fun personality made for great communication! Some questions I emailed to her late-night on the weekends were answered immediately, even though I didn’t expect an answer until Monday morning. She has the grit, positive energy, expertise and charm from which any real estate investor would benefit. We also closed the sale after only 33 days after the first and only listing. We highly recommend Carrie!

place_name: Carolina One: Carrie Rosen
content: As a fellow surfer, I have known  Carrie amd John (atty) for years, but only recently had occasion to engage them for a real estate transaction. Carrie is driven and tenacious, and will not give up until all parties are satisfied. She can hold her own in a cutthroat market, but has impeccable integrity. She is charming, sharp, and available for conversation. I wholeheartedly commend her to you.

place_name: Carolina One: Carrie Rosen
content: We just closed on a house in Folly Beach, and were so impressed with Carrie and John at Sweet Grass Real Estate. They were upbeat, super responsive, flexible, gracious, savvy, and professional. They found us our dream house within about a month, which is still hard to believe in this current market!  It was Carrie’s stellar personal and professional relationships on Folly that made it happen. There’s no way we would have had this opportunity with anyone else. They’re hyper local, which is invaluable in coastal Charleston. We also had some auxiliary contract issues besides the purchase-John’s law background was a huge help. Lovely people and a superlative experience-I’d give more stars if I could. Thank you, Carrie and John!

place_name: Carolina One: Carrie Rosen
content: I had been wanting to purchase a home in SC for years. I lived out of state. I decided this was the year (last year) and Carrie worked with me by sending me links to homes that fit my budget. I was supposed to arrive in SC to actually “look” at places in the early Spring but the pandemic stopped that. Carrie actually found me a place in the meantime and we took action. From there on out, during this time, Carrie took charge for me and found me a great home without me ever seeing it in person. She took notes on what I liked, what I wanted and she delivered. Her dedication to getting me my home here was outstanding!  Carrie FaceTimed me my new home and I can’t thank her enough for all she did. She is loyal, trustworthy (as I put my whole trust in her) and was never disappointed. Not only was she very professional with everything, she was a great friend personally to help make a dream of mine to live by the beach a reality! Thank you Carrie !!

place_name: Carolina One: Carrie Rosen
content: Carrie did an amazing job for us!  Overall quick and easy experience!  She was available and responsive and helped with our negotiation to get us our property on Folly!  Great recommendations for other services and helped to keep the process moving as we were not local (yet!).  Highly recommend!!!

place_name: Carolina One: Carrie Rosen
content: My husband and I decided we wanted a second home in the area. My daughter, who lives on James Island, recommended we call Carrie. Our entire experience with Carrie was great. She listened to what we were looking for and worked to match us with what was available. Carrie knows the area very well and knows not only what is available but what might be coming available. That is very important with this real estate market. Lets just say “she knows her stuff” She found us a condo that “checked off all our boxes” She answered all our questions, worked with us through the entire process and then continued to support us afterwards - just to make sure all was well.  Believe me, that is not always the case. Felt like I was working with a good friend! Thank you, Carrie!

place_name: Carolina One: Carrie Rosen
content: Carrie is by far the best real estate agent I have ever worked with, and I have worked with many.  She is responsive, patient and personable.  She goes the extra mile for her clients.  Carrie has measured walls for me, received packages and taken out the garbage and recycling all at a home I owned but couldn’t yet occupy.  She’s a wonderful person and businesswoman.

place_name: Carolina One: Carrie Rosen
content: Carrie is an exceptional agent and goes above and beyond. She offers assistance well beyond the buying and selling of a home.

place_name: Carolina One: Carrie Rosen
content: We have know Carrie Danker for over 10 years. She is a wonderful person, We had no doubt that we wanted her to help us find our first home. She was able to ease our minds and keep us on track when looking at homes. I would recommend her for buying or selling a home. She went to great lengths to keep us informed. Thank you Carrie!!

place_name: Carolina One: Carrie Rosen
content: Working with Carrie on my last Folly Beach deal was an absolute pleasure. Just follow her social media to see the incredible   properties she 'discovers.'  For a first time homebuyer or investor, her knowledge of the area and the intricate nuances of a fairly complicated housing market is invaluable.  In this case, Carrie knew what I was looking for and amazingly found a pocket listing (aka a sweet deal) that we had under contract before it even hit the market.  That's the type of realtor you want working for you.  Thank you Carrie!  ??????

place_name: Carolina One: Carrie Rosen
content: We met Carrie shortly after we moved to Charleston and just happened to be needing a real estate agent. We were renting at the time and wanted to buy a home. place_name: Carolina One: Carrie Rosen
content: Just wow!  I cannot believe what an awesome experience it was in putting my trust and home in Carrie's hands!  From day one, she was there for me; every step of the way. Carrie answered her phone every time I called, and always put me at ease with any questions or concerns.  I felt so comfortable with Carrie and would highly recommend her representing you and being your agent.

place_name: Carolina One: Carrie Rosen
content: This is long overdue but I wanted express my appreciation to Carrie for selling my home on Johns Island and purchasing a new home on James Island. My house sold above asking price and we found a house that was perfect for myself and three kiddos. Along the way, the process was smooth with zero hiccups.  She communicates better than any other professional I have ever worked with and she answered the phone every time I called. Every.single.time.

place_name: Carolina One: Carrie Rosen
content: Carrie was persistent and listened to what we were looking for. She was able to adapt to our circumstances throughout our search and she never allowed us to get disheartened. She was always upbeat and we could trust her when she selected houses for us to see. We had the most amazing time over the past months in our search and we are so grateful that she found us our perfect home. I would recommend her to anyone looking for a home.

place_name: Carolina One: Carrie Rosen
content: Carrie is professional, super responsive...always available and accessible to her clients. She knows Folly Beach inside and out and is such a valuable resource. place_name: Carolina One: Carrie Rosen
content: Incredible doesn’t do Sweetgrass justice. From day one Carrie was incredibly professional and genuinely committed to our home search. I’m convinced that without her expertise and guidance, our dream of home ownership wouldn’t have come to fruition.

place_name: Carolina One: Carrie Rosen
content: Carrie is absolutely wonderful to work with. It’s like having a friend on the “inside” that is working for you. Carrie found our dream home in less than a week. place_name: Carolina One: Carrie Rosen
